# Pratham Kadam

> Pratham Kadam is a freelance full stack developer in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.

Official website: https://prathamkadam.netlify.app

Primary services:
- SEO-friendly business website development
- Custom web application development
- E-commerce website development
- Website redesign and technical SEO
- Website maintenance and support

Core technologies:
- Next.js
- React
- Node.js
- MongoDB
- Tailwind CSS
